# F9XR's SEO CodeBase Auditor SKILL

> Enterprise-grade SEO auditing for static code repositories. 24 pillars, one file, production-ready fix blocks.

## Key Files

- SKILL.md: The audit skill file - drop into any project root and run with @SKILL.md
- index.html: Project landing page with documentation and prompt templates
- DESIGN.md: Design system tokens, typography, spacing, and component specifications
- Frontend-Design.md: Design philosophy and visual principles
- prompts.txt: Collection of SEO audit prompts for various use cases

## Core Features

- 24-pillar SEO audit coverage
- 5-pass audit workflow (Discover, Analyze, Prioritize, Report, Critique)
- Priority Fix Matrix capped at 20 items
- Per-pillar evaluations with current code and fix blocks
- CSV export for spreadsheet integration
- Context-aware pillar selection (suppresses irrelevant checks)

## Reference URLs

- Project: https://github.com/f9xr/seo-audit-report-skill
- Organization: https://f9xr.github.io
- Google Search Central: https://developers.google.com/search/docs
- Schema.org: https://schema.org/
- Core Web Vitals: https://web.dev/vitals/
- IndexNow Protocol: https://www.bing.com/IndexNow
